title: Magically Crispy Jamaican Chicken Skillet
description: This sweet and crispy one-pot Jamaican dish features sherry vinegar and render-fat, making it a nut-free friendly option for a delicious dinner.
instructions: Heat the render-fat in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the sherry vinegar, brown sugar, soy sauce, jamaican jerk seasoning, and garlic powder to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook until the sauce has thickened and the chicken is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Serve the chicken and sauce hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the dish rest for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
